sentence_reviews.text: Model merging combines compatible checkpoints or parameter deltas in weight space to obtain a new model without conventional joint retraining.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Wortsman et al. support weight averaging/model soups across fine-tuned checkpoints; LoRA supports adapter-style parameter-efficient deltas, but the packet lacks a broader model-merging survey.
sentence_reviews.notes: Model soups directly supports checkpoint averaging without extra inference cost, but compatible parameter deltas and broad weight-space composition go beyond the cited node source.

sentence_reviews.text: It offers a low-cost route to combine specialized capabilities, ensembling effects, or independently fine-tuned variants.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Wortsman et al. support weight averaging/model soups across fine-tuned checkpoints; LoRA supports adapter-style parameter-efficient deltas, but the packet lacks a broader model-merging survey.
sentence_reviews.notes: Combining fine-tuned checkpoints cheaply is supported; specialized capabilities and ensembling effects are broader synthesis.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Wortsman et al. support weight averaging/model soups across fine-tuned checkpoints; LoRA supports adapter-style parameter-efficient deltas, but the packet lacks a broader model-merging survey.
sentence_reviews.notes: Checkpoint/weight averaging is directly supported by Model Soups.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Wortsman et al. support weight averaging/model soups across fine-tuned checkpoints; LoRA supports adapter-style parameter-efficient deltas, but the packet lacks a broader model-merging survey.
sentence_reviews.notes: Task-vector merging is not supported by the cited Model Soups/LoRA sources in this packet.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Wortsman et al. support weight averaging/model soups across fine-tuned checkpoints; LoRA supports adapter-style parameter-efficient deltas, but the packet lacks a broader model-merging survey.
sentence_reviews.notes: Adapter fusion is related to PEFT/adapters but is not directly supported by the cited LoRA paper alone.

sentence_reviews.text: Parameter alignment, interference, tokenizer mismatch, and evaluation across merged capabilities remain difficult.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Wortsman et al. support weight averaging/model soups across fine-tuned checkpoints; LoRA supports adapter-style parameter-efficient deltas, but the packet lacks a broader model-merging survey.
sentence_reviews.notes: Interference/alignment concerns are plausible, but tokenizer mismatch and evaluation across merged capabilities are not directly supported by the packet sources.

sentence_reviews.text: Model merging & weight-space composition uses Supervised fine-tuning & instruction tuning as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Wortsman et al. support weight averaging/model soups across fine-tuned checkpoints; LoRA supports adapter-style parameter-efficient deltas, but the packet lacks a broader model-merging survey.
sentence_reviews.notes: Model soups average fine-tuned checkpoints; SFT/instruction tuning is a plausible source of variants, but not definitional.

sentence_reviews.text: Model merging & weight-space composition uses Parameter-efficient tuning, adapters & LoRA as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Wortsman et al. support weight averaging/model soups across fine-tuned checkpoints; LoRA supports adapter-style parameter-efficient deltas, but the packet lacks a broader model-merging survey.
sentence_reviews.notes: Adapters/LoRA can be merged or composed, but Model Soups does not require PEFT and LoRA does not establish this edge alone.

sentence_reviews.text: Model merging & weight-space composition uses Linear algebra as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Wortsman et al. support weight averaging/model soups across fine-tuned checkpoints; LoRA supports adapter-style parameter-efficient deltas, but the packet lacks a broader model-merging survey.
sentence_reviews.notes: Weight averaging and parameter deltas rely on vector-space operations.

sentence_reviews.text: Model merging & weight-space composition uses Optimization theory as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Wortsman et al. support weight averaging/model soups across fine-tuned checkpoints; LoRA supports adapter-style parameter-efficient deltas, but the packet lacks a broader model-merging survey.
sentence_reviews.notes: Optimization produces source checkpoints, but model merging itself is not clearly an optimization-theory method in the cited evidence.

edge_reviews.notes: Fine-tuned variants are inputs to merging, but SFT as core is stronger than supported.
PEFT/LoRA is related to parameter deltas, but not a core dependency of model merging generally.
Averaging and deltas are linear algebra operations; common strength is reasonable.
Optimization is upstream of checkpoints but not directly a common ingredient of the merge operation.
